Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}What the—? There's no scar... Not even a mark?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}Say, Junpei... What do you do to make yourself feel alive?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Y'know, I can't say I've ever thought about it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}How 'bout you, Chidori? Is that how you feel when you draw?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}I don't know... Most of these are just scribbles.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I don't really... understand myself.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}To tell ya the truth, there IS one thing that makes me feel alive...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}It's when I sort of, uh... get to play the hero, I guess?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}In the darkest hour, unknown to all but a few, the chosen ones stand against the forces of evil![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 2 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}Our hero, Junpei, fights to protect the world from these terrifying monsters![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Heheh... Well, you get the idea. That's when I feel most alive![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 3 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Um... This is the part where you're s'posed to laugh.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}H-Hey, I was just kiddin' around...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}You fight during a time that no one is aware of, right?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}That means no one knows what you've been doing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 26 0 0}So, you're fighting even though you'll never get any recognition for anything.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}I didn't think you'd actually believe me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Y'know, you're kinda the weird one here...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 1 1 25 25}Hmmm... I guess it's okay, but you're sworn to secrecy, got it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}So, there's this special power called a "Persona," and that's what we use to defeat the monsters.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 0 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}But not everyone can use a Persona. That's what I meant by "the chosen ones."[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_019_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 36 0 0}My friends are fighting, too... And, not to brag, but we haven't lost a single fight since I joined![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}That sounds like a lot of fun.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}If you haven't lost a single fight, that must mean you're really strong.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}I guess you could kinda say I'm the leader...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_021_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 41 0 0}I mean, without me, things would just fall apart.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 1 1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 42 0 0}I gotta tell everyone what to do and stuff, y'know? It's a lot of work, bein' in charge.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}Thank you, Junpei... I had a lot of fun today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 213 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 46 0 0}It's time for me to go. I'll see you tomorrow, right?[n]{f 1 1}
